claim: Eidetic-Plus is a governed, provenance-first long-horizon memory agent. The current runtime returns only VERIFIED answers with resolving immutable proof or explicit citation-free ABSTAINED results. The committed rolling aggregate leads Mem0 under this repository's fixed-reader regime, while individual windows include a loss and stronger RAG baselines lead raw accuracy on the published n=80 comparison. No best-system, SOTA, or general accuracy-leadership claim is made.
explicitly_not_claimed: SOTA / best-in-world (requires bench/reproduce.sh >=10-run sweep + external evidence for Chronos, Mastra, ByteRover, Hindsight -- not run)
any accuracy claim from a single window (windows swing +-5pp at n=40; the rolling n>=240 table is the evidence unit)
release_gate PASS (the fail-closed gate requires the full multi-run artifact set; see release_gate_report.json in this directory for the honest check-by-check status)

evidence.rolling_holdout: bench/rolling_holdout_table.py over artifacts/holdout_rotation_r1..r8_codex (raw per-row jsonl); n=320, 182 vs 140, verified 277 vs 0
evidence.slice7: artifacts/holdout_rotation_r7_codex (launch_A.log pins SHA + product_cost profile overlay)
evidence.slice8: artifacts/holdout_rotation_r8_codex (launch_A/B.log pin SHA 6551ac048 + product_cost overlay; VW-killer + event-date family + date-fix)
evidence.phase_a_replay: artifacts/replay_phase_a_r1_r10/replay_manifest.json + replay_report.json; 400 frozen rows, 12 historical unverified deliveries converted to abstentions, 0 remain, 212/212 verified-correct preserved, zero provider/NLI/generation calls

limitations: Single benchmark run (runs=1) on one 40-sample rotation window; the >=10-run bench/reproduce.sh sweep has not been run.
LoCoMo only in this artifact dir; LongMemEval categories not covered here.
Baselines in this dir: mem0 only; rag-full/rag-vector/graphiti/eidetic-product not in this window's logs.
Dev-split cost median (83 qtok) is NOT a holdout number; holdout r7 structured coverage 13/40 kept the holdout median on the reader plateau (4,029).
Windows swing +-5pp at n=40; the rolling n=280 table is the evidence unit, not any single window.
Mem0's write-side token cost is unlogged in its adapter; its totals are understated in all comparisons.
Ablation evidence (metabolism/forgetting attribution) not present in this artifact dir; see docs/claims.md Claim B for the program.

Named comparators publish 83-96% self-reported accuracy with frontier readers (GPT-5/Gemini-3/Opus) and their own judges; under our deliberately-fixed qwen-plus reader the regimes are not commensurable, and we do not claim to beat them. comparator_research.json carries the sourced records.

Attribution ablation (Claim B: memory layer earns its keep) is NOT cleanly measured: the 5-arm dev ablation is a ~6h uninterrupted job this session-bound environment cannot sustain (killed on teardown twice). A directional metabolism-off signal (~+19pp accuracy drop) appeared in an error-polluted run and is deliberately not cited. docs/claims.md commits to reporting it — including any honest negative — once run uninterrupted.
The Phase A replay is a deterministic output-policy projection over frozen labels, not a rerun of retrieval, generation, NLI, or judges; historical CAS stores were not re-fetched.

The replay panel contains 129/341 historically verified but judge-wrong rows (37.8%). Verification proves resolving evidence under the recorded proof contract, not task correctness or completeness. Fresh unseen runtime reruns remain required for accuracy-first release readiness.
external_system_evidence_note: Verified web-research records in comparator_research.json (2026-07-04): every number is vendor/author self-reported with no independent reproduction found; judges and reader backbones differ per system, so none are commensurable with this repo's fixed-reader fixed-judge harness. Recorded for scope-boundary honesty, NOT entered as gate-valid external evidence.
